title: Elaphrium palmeri
taxonomy: Elaphrium palmeri is classified as a type of flowering plant, specifically belonging to the family Cactaceae. This classification is based on its physical characteristics, such as its stems and flowers, which are typical of cacti. Within the Cactaceae family, Elaphrium palmeri is often grouped as a genus within the subfamily Pereskioideae. The subfamily Pereskioideae is a group of cacti that have characteristics similar to those of the related plant family Piperaceae. As a member of the Pereskioideae subfamily, Elaphrium palmeri shares these characteristics with other plants in this group.
